data.title: 国际服游戏部网页奖励活动
data.summary: [Visit the Game Development Department Club Room!] New Year with Blue Archive event is in progress.
data.body:
[Visit the Game Development Department Club Room!]

New Year with Blue Archive event is in progress.
Just log in to the event page every day for exorbitant rewards!
Don't forget to follow the official Twitter!

Event Details: https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2021/12/holiday

#BlueArchive
